name: somtimz-plugins
description: Enterprise Architecture, research, strategy critique, RAG, and ITIL plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: ea-assistant
plugins.description: End-to-end Enterprise Architecture engagement management with motivation framework (Drivers/Goals/Objectives/Issues/Problems), artifact generation, phase interviews, grill-me integration, brainstorming, requirements analysis, and governance management (Governance Framework, Implementation Governance Plan, Change Register). Supports TOGAF 10, Zachman, and ArchiMate.

plugins.name: RAG-assistant
plugins.description: Conversational RAG assistant — ingests local and SharePoint documents into a ChromaDB vector store and exposes a web UI for natural-language Q&A, document management, and pipeline control.

plugins.name: research-agent
plugins.description: A Lead Research Analyst agent that conducts deep, evidence-based research into topics, codebases, and documents — with confidence scoring, contradiction detection, and executive-ready synthesis.

plugins.name: grill-me
plugins.description: Nine interview skills for stress-testing strategies, decisions, risks, and designs — strategic stress-test, pre-mortem and risk review, decision memo, boardroom strategy, service/software/infrastructure design critique, artifact review, and diagram review.

plugins.name: ITIL-assistant
plugins.description: ITIL v4 Change Management assistant — create, manage, and review Change Requests with CAB approval workflow.
